title: Tracing, Evals, and Failure Analysis · State Workshop
summary: Evaluate a multi-turn tool agent across realistic environments. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of an agent trace and evaluation suite while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record decisions, tool calls, results, state changes, timing, and identifiers without exposing private reasoning.
Evaluate action trajectories and state outcomes as well as final text.
Build deterministic environments and representative multi-turn cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""

steps.title: Commit to the mission model
steps.instruction:
workshop case — Use a changed workshop case for loops observability evals that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
